# ArchSpine Feature Request Template

## Purpose
This document provides a standardized template for submitting feature requests to the ArchSpine project. It ensures that all proposals clearly articulate the problem, the desired solution, and any alternative approaches considered.

## Context and Audience
This template is intended for contributors and users of the ArchSpine mirror system who wish to propose new capabilities or workflow improvements. It helps maintain consistency and completeness in feature request submissions.

## Key Takeaways
- Feature requests must describe the problem to solve
- Proposed solutions should detail expected behavior, commands, or UX
- Alternatives considered help evaluate the proposal's necessity and scope
